title: Carronade Capital Urges Cannae Holdings to Answer Crucial Questions on Today’s Earnings Call
author: Carronade Capital Management, Lp
description: Carronade Capital, a top shareholder of Cannae Holdings, publicly criticized the company's board for lack of transparency, delayed annual meeting, and questionable governance practices, calling for accountability and proposing four independent director nominees.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Criticized for poor stock performance (-5% absolute, -156% relative), delayed annual meeting, generous management compensation, and board composition that appears to entrench current leadership
Mentioned as a recent sale, with proceeds partially committed to share repurchases
